title: A Week in Provence: Callas & Beyond

checkpoints.title: Rent Car from Avid
checkpoints.description: Pick up car rental. 5 places, 2 drivers, full coverage.

checkpoints.title: Drive to a supermarket (eg Proxi)
checkpoints.description: Toilet paper, soap, sampoo, and some snacks. The house does not have stuff.

checkpoints.title: Travel to 25 Bd des Poilus, 83830 Callas, France.
[Optional] Explore the village and have dinner.
checkpoints.description: Walk to the town square and check out the restaurants. La Grotte Italienne is a suggestion from Gemini :D.

days.day: Saturday, 2nd May 2026 - Local Charm & Gourmet Night

checkpoints.title: Breakfast from Clothilde
checkpoints.description: Walk to the local baker, Clothilde, for heavenly baguettes and croissants to enjoy on the dining room balcony.

checkpoints.title: Callas Saturday Market
checkpoints.description: Explore the local market in Callas. Buy some fresh local produce, olives, and perhaps a cooked chicken for lunch. Or some food for the next days.

checkpoints.title: Drive to Lake of Sainte-Croix
checkpoints.description: An hour and 20 minutes drive.

checkpoints.title: Canoeing at the Lake of Sainte-Croix and picnic
checkpoints.description: Rent canoe for half a day. Take the canoe across the Lac de Sainte-Croix to the Gorges du Verdon. Enjoy a picnic lunch on the shore of the lake or in the canoe. Can take break on the shore and swim.

checkpoints.title: Drive back to Callas
checkpoints.description: Head back to Callas to freshen up before dinner.

checkpoints.title: Dinner at La maison de campagne
checkpoints.description: Great reviews and large portions, perfect after an exhausting day. Also very close to stay.

checkpoints.title: [Optional] Morning run
checkpoints.description: 5km?

checkpoints.title: Breakfast and Coffee at Home
checkpoints.description: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast on the balcony with the pastries from Clothilde and some fresh fruit.

checkpoints.title: Drive to Nice Airport
checkpoints.description: Pick up the other couple and Sofinicka.

checkpoints.title: Relax in the Garden/Park
checkpoints.description: Take the toddler to the small communal park right next to the house for some fresh air and playtime after their travel.

checkpoints.title: BBQ at Home
checkpoints.description: Use the grill outside the basement. Enjoy dinner outdoors with a bottle of local wine while the toddler safely plays nearby.

checkpoints.title: Evening Revision & Games
checkpoints.description: Revise traveling plans for the next days, discuss any changes, and maybe play some board games or card games together.

checkpoints.title: Breakfast at local bakery
checkpoints.description: By this time, Bubu and Bebe will probably know which places. (Maybe consider groceries shopping as well)

checkpoints.title: Drive to Bargemon
checkpoints.description: A short 5km drive up the mountain to the picturesque village of Bargemon. Very stroller friendly and easy for the toddler.

checkpoints.title: Spring Water & Sightseeing
checkpoints.description: Fill up empty water bottles at the famous fountain. Walk the ancient Roman streets and snap family photos.

checkpoints.title: Lunch in the Square
checkpoints.description: Grab a casual lunch at one of the lively restaurants in Bargemon's town square.

checkpoints.title: Nap Time / Chill Time
checkpoints.description: Head back to the house. Toddler naps while the adults enjoy a glass of rosé on the balcony or in the cool basement.

checkpoints.title: [Optional] Bubu and bebe dinner
checkpoints.description: Bubu and Bebe can go out to dinner. The others can have a quiet night at home with the toddler.

days.day: Tuesday, 5th May 2026 - Beach Day at Sainte Maxime

checkpoints.title: Drive to the Coast (Nartelle Beach)
checkpoints.description: Drive 30 minutes to Sainte Maxime. Bring beach gear and towels.

checkpoints.title: Return to Callas
checkpoints.description: Head back up the mountain to escape the coastal heat. Easy dinner at home with groceries from the local Proxi.

checkpoints.title: Morning Walk (AllTrails)
checkpoints.description: Use the AllTrails app to find an easy, flat walking route nearby suitable for a stroller or baby carrier.

checkpoints.title: Chateau d'Esclans Tasting
checkpoints.description: Drive down the mountain toward Callas to visit the home of 'Whispering Angel' rosé. The adults can take turns tasting while the toddler explores the beautiful estate grounds.

checkpoints.title: Dinner at La Fontaine
checkpoints.description: Dine outdoors at the hotel restaurant in Callas. Very accessible and comfortable for groups with kids.

checkpoints.title: Final Pastries
checkpoints.description: One last run to Clothilde for the best baked goods in the region.

checkpoints.title: House Clean-up
checkpoints.description: Empty the fridge/freezer, start the dishwasher, and take all remaining trash to the street containers.

checkpoints.title: Departure
checkpoints.description: Lock the house, place the key back in Keybox no. 2, and begin the journey home.
